Temple Festivals

✦   DIVINE CELEBRATIONS   ✦

Festivals at Sri Venugopala Swamy Temple are celebrated with devotion, grandeur, and ancient Vedic traditions that bring together devotees from far and near.

Sri Rukmini Satyabhama Sametha
Sri Venugopala Swamy Temple

A divine abode of Lord Venugopala Swamy, Goddess Rukmini, and Goddess Satyabhama — blessing all devotees with love, grace, and prosperity.
